# slurm_user (Resource)

Manages a Slurm user with embedded account associations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "slurm_user" "alice" {
  name            = "alice"
  default_account = slurm_account.physics.name

  association {
    account     = slurm_account.physics.name
    fairshare   = 50
    default_qos = slurm_qos.standard.name
    qos         = [slurm_qos.standard.name, slurm_qos.priority.name]
  }
}

# User with multiple account associations
resource "slurm_user" "bob" {
  name            = "bob"
  default_account = slurm_account.physics.name

  association {
    account   = slurm_account.physics.name
    fairshare = 30
  }

  association {
    account   = slurm_account.hep.name
    fairshare = 20
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `default_account` (String) The user's default Slurm account. Must match one of the association accounts.
- `name` (String) The Slurm user name.

### Optional

- `admin_level` (String) Administrative level: None, Operator, or Administrator.
- `association` (Block Set) Account associations for this user. Each block defines the user's membership in an account with associated limits and QOS settings. At least one association is required. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--association))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The user name (same as name).

<a id="nestedblock--association"></a>
### Nested Schema for `association`

Required:

- `account` (String) The Slurm account name for this association.

Optional:

- `default_qos` (String) Default QOS for this association.
- `fairshare` (Number) Fairshare value for this association.
- `max_jobs` (Number) Maximum number of running jobs for this association.
- `partition` (String) Optional partition to scope this association to.
- `qos` (List of String) List of allowed QOS names for this association.
